file-name-snake-case.note: DEAD RULE — fires on correct PascalCase components and camelCase modules; frozen at current count pending Phase 5 retirement in favor of @typescript-eslint/naming-convention. Do not raise; do not rename files to satisfy it.

file-too-long.note: src/** files over 800 code lines (blank/comment lines skipped). Ratchet down as Phase 3 splits land; never raise.

function-too-long.note: Function bodies over 200 code lines in src/**. Ratchet down only.

function-too-complex.note: Cyclomatic complexity over 20 in src/**. Parser/solver heavy; ratchet down only.

too-many-params.note: Functions with more than 4 params in src/**. Prefer an options object; ratchet down only.

too-deep.note: Block nesting deeper than 4 in src/**. Ratchet down only.

nullable-undefined-type-alias.note: Historical top-level type aliases with null or undefined unions.

dynamic-code-execution.note: Historical browser test helper callbacks using new Function.

css-important.note: Historical Tailwind utility font-size overrides and scrollbar styling.

css-declaration-order.note: Historical CSS declaration ordering differences; Google marks alphabetical order optional.
